records.service_description: Supports SMEs in establishing and maintaining connections with key industry and government stakeholders.
key_highlights: Formal facilitation of introductions to relevant government and industry entities.
Support to initiate contact aligned to defined business objectives.
Guidance on appropriate channels and points of contact.
records.searchable_content: Facilitate Communication With Strategic Stakeholders supports Small Enterprises (SEs) and Medium Enterprises (MdEs) in establishing and maintaining connections with key industry and government stakeholders. This support service helps businesses in the launch and growth stages by facilitating introductions, initiating contact aligned with business objectives, and guiding appropriate channel selection.

records.service_description: Through this service, entrepreneurs are matched with relevant partners and clients, unlocking collaborations, vendor agreements, and business growth opportunities.
steps: KF identifies and validates suitable matches.
records.searchable_content: Non-Financial Services Marketplace matches entrepreneurs with relevant partners and clients, unlocking collaborations, vendor agreements, and business growth opportunities. This business development, incentives, and incubation service is designed for SMEs, startups, and export-oriented businesses in growth, expansion, and optimization stages, and requires Khalifa Fund membership.

records.service_description: Provides SMEs with access to high-impact exhibitions, conferences, and trade shows to showcase products, expand networks, and explore commercial opportunities.
eligibility_requirements: Subject to event criteria and KF selection
key_highlights: Through this service, SMEs can participate in curated exhibitions and conferences, boosting visibility, market positioning, and partnerships in local and international markets.
records.cost: Fees may apply (subsidized by KF in some cases)
steps: KF supports registration, booth setup, and logistics.
Attend event and submit post-event feedback.
records.searchable_content: Events & Exhibitions Participation Support provides SMEs with access to high-impact exhibitions, conferences, and trade shows to showcase products, expand networks, and explore commercial opportunities. This calendar marketplace service is aimed at SMEs, startups, and export-oriented businesses in growth, expansion, and optimization stages to boost local and international visibility.
